name: Eggplant in Coconut Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the eggplant about 1/3 inch to 1/2 inch thick.
2. Dilute 1 can of coconut milk with 1/2 can of water.
3. Mix salt and turmeric in a bowl.
4. Rub the mixture into the eggplant slices.
5. Heat 5 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a pan and brown the slices on both sides. (A Teflon pan is especially good for this)
6. Remove the browned slices from the pan and set aside.
7. In the same pan, heat remaining tablespoon of oil and fry mustard seeds until they crackle.
8. Add the next 9 ingredients (including cinnamon) to the pan. Fry for a minute or two.
9. Pour vinegar over the eggplant slices.
10. Gently stir in the coconut milk mixture.
11. Simmer very slowly, stirring frequently, for about 15 minutes.
12. Add sugar and remove from the pan. Serve.
